Precondition: Box_2 is on top of box_1 and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: The robot is holding box_2 with both end effectors.

Precondition: The robot holds box_2 and the target spot on the table right of box_1 is clear.
Postcondition: Box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and both end effectors are free.

Precondition: Box_1 is unobstructed and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: The robot is holding box_1 with both end effectors.
